heading: Persons born in Hawaii
label: 1405 Persons born in Hawaii
text: A person born in Hawaii on or after , and before , is declared to be a citizen of the United States as of . A person born in Hawaii on or after , is a citizen of the United States at birth. A person who was a citizen of the Republic of Hawaii on , is declared to be a citizen of the United States as of .August 12, 1898April 30, 1900April 30, 1900April 30, 1900August 12, 1898April 30, 1900
